description: Mountain Goat Software provides agile and Scrum training, coaching, and related learning resources. Its MGS AI Toolkit is an AI-assisted product tied to MGS Essentials.
summary: Mountain Goat Software exposes one known developer surface: an OAuth-protected MCP server for the MGS Agile Toolkit at https://ai-toolkit.mountaingoatsoftware.com/mcp; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI surfaces were found.
